track_prompt: Improve synthesis-01 without weakening its editorial hierarchy, protected signal-module brand language, contrast-safe CTA, or measured title/panel firewall. React to real rendered evidence, not a hypothetical defect.
input_feedback: Inkscape rendering of synthesis-01 exposed compact hybrid venue overset: 'HUB A + WEB' measured [670.505,290.46,779.358,301.285] while its compact card ended at x=776. The fixed three-column compact metadata component failed its own published 11-character budget. Parent evidence also retained fixed badge-width and long-title capacity risks.
judge_feedback: Provisional self-observation after Inkscape render and rendered-bbox queries: the metadata repair is material and measurable. The stress venue 'INNOVATION HUB + ONLINE' ends at x=289.239 with 82.761px before the inner card edge; two additional long venues retain 111.94px or more. A real three-line title, long venue, and 'HYBRID + REMOTE' badge coexist without overlap. The actual title right edge is x=640.484, leaving 111.516px to the routing panel, and CTA contrast remains 11.67:1. All objective gates now pass. Subjective promotion remains unavailable until an independent panel inspects the two rendered previews.
next_prompt: Independent panel review should compare synthesis-01 and synthesis-02 previews for hierarchy, brand distinctiveness, information clarity, system coherence, and production polish. If another loop were authorized later, test localization and bidirectional text, because current resilience evidence covers English content lengths but not translated expansion or RTL ordering.
